description: You are an 8th-grade student at an OLPC school researching global development. Using the historical dataset at /home/ga/Documents/gapminder.csv, compare Rwanda and Sweden for the years 1952 and 2007. Extract the exact population ('pop') and life expectancy ('lifeExp') values for these years and calculate the absolute change in life expectancy for both countries. Create a report in the Sugar Write activity containing a data table with the population and life expectancy values and a conclusion section stating the calculated changes. Save the final report as /home/ga/Documents/development_report.odt. Ensure the exact, unrounded population numbers and your calculated differences are included in the document.
